text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
63 
GAP_DAYS_MO_1M 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Pharmacy — days in 1 month supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_MO_1M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
—
